message:
feat(gmail,google-ai,google-calendar,linear,twitter,youtube): multi-auth provisioning automation with doctor diagnostics

Implement the provisioning automation pattern across 6 more connectors,
adding dual authentication mode support (direct credentials vs secretless
credential_id for egress proxy injection), health checks, doctor
diagnostics, and self-check reporting.

Gmail connector:
- GmailAuth enum with AccessToken, CredentialId, and OAuthRefresh modes
- OAuth refresh token flow for automatic token renewal
- health_check() via profile endpoint, list_history() API method
- Doctor diagnostics with configuration and auth_mode checks
- SelfCheckReport for handle_self_check()
- 155 lines of new integration tests

Google AI connector:
- GoogleAiAuth enum (ApiKey/CredentialId) with apply_auth() helper
- GoogleAiConfig::from_params with strict mutual exclusivity validation
- health_check(), full Doctor implementation with 6 checks
- Credential injection via X-FCP-Credential-ID header

Google Calendar connector:
- GoogleCalendarAuth enum (Token/CredentialId) with apply_auth()
- All HTTP methods updated from hardcoded bearer_auth() to apply_auth()
- health_check(), Doctor types, SelfCheckReport

Linear connector:
- LinearAuth enum (ApiKey/CredentialId) with apply_auth()
- Content-Type header moved from default headers to per-request injection
- health_check(), Doctor diagnostics

Twitter connector:
- TwitterAuth enum (OAuth/CredentialId) with optional OAuthSigner
- Secretless mode for stream rules and app-only auth endpoints
- health_check(), SelfCheckReport

YouTube connector:
- YouTubeAuth enum (ApiKey/CredentialId)
- url_with_key() / apply_auth() helpers for secretless mode
- health_check(), full Doctor with 6 checks, handle_self_check()

All connectors wire up "doctor" and "self_check" message dispatch.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -97,6 +97,8 @@ async fn handle_message(connector: &mut GmailConnector, message: &str) -> serde_
         "configure" => connector.handle_configure(params).await,
         "handshake" => connector.handle_handshake(params).await,
         "health" => connector.handle_health().await,
+        "doctor" => connector.handle_doctor().await,
+        "self_check" => connector.handle_self_check().await,
         "introspect" => connector.handle_introspect().await,
         "invoke" => connector.handle_invoke(params).await,
         "simulate" => connector.handle_simulate(params).await,
